svg.text: • 215. Kth Largest Element in an Array — quickselect or heap
• 703. Kth Largest in a Stream — min-heap of size k, online
• 973. K Closest Points to Origin — heap by squared distance
• 658. Find K Closest Elements — binary search for window or heap
• 378. Kth Smallest in Sorted Matrix — heap or binary-search on value
• 786. Kth Smallest Prime Fraction — heap of (num, den) pairs
• 347. Top K Frequent Elements — counter + min-heap (or bucket sort)
• 692. Top K Frequent Words — comparator: frequency desc, lex asc
• 451. Sort Characters by Frequency — counter + bucket / heap
• 1985. Find the Kth Largest Integer in the Array — string-comparator heap
• 1845. Seat Reservation Manager — min-heap of available seats
• 295. Find Median from Data Stream — two heaps (top-k variant)
If the question says "top k", your default tool is the bounded heap.
